﻿.. _dp-NDFilterPreset1Value:

CrDeviceProperty_NDFilterPreset1Value
=====================================

Get/Set the ND filter preset 1 value.

    CrDataType: `CrDataType_UInt64Array`

.. list-table::
  :widths: auto
  :header-rows: 1

  * - Parameter Code
    - Explanation

  * - CrNDFilterPresetValue_Nothing
    - | nothing to display.

  * - Other than above values
    - | The real value of ND Filter (Upper four bytes: numerator, Lower four bytes: denominator)
